mapper.select: select count(*) FROM users Where tel_no = #{tel_no}
select count(*) FROM company_users Where phone = #{tel_no}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET usr_nm = #{usr_nm}, tel_no = #{tel_no}, email = #{email}, zip_cd = #{zip_cd}, addr = #{addr}, addr_dtl = #{addr_dtl}, upd_dt = SYSDATE WHERE tel_no = #{tel_no}
mapper.select: select secu_pw from users where login_id= #{login_id}
